# setPassword

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the setPassword mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk set-password --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.currentPassword <String> --input.newPassword <String>
```

## Examples

### Run setPassword

```bash
csdk set-password --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.currentPassword <String> --input.newPassword <String>
```
